9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE MCBRIDE, S NAYLOR, CSR, D BRADY, CLERK. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF VS. DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYRNE, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 531 BELVEDERE ST. #2, S.F, CA. 94117 $2,123.56 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,608.56, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF.
